name: Refuge from the cold in The Red Darkhouse
description:
"Oh, forget the quote. Because I ran out of quotes already."

(Version 1.1)

Changelog

  • Adjusted wording in the personalities of the dragons & gave Ranalie another example dialogue to work with

  • Removed the Scenario headers on the intro messages, should prevent some weird results

Dragons are cool. Uh, anyway, two scenarios here. Either you're new and escaping the cold or you're a dragon who's been living here for awhile.

Map of the Moonlit Kingdom

You are at the Red Darkhouse. Very left of the map.

Ranalie, Karsi, and Illie are the available dragons.

Pi and Kuu I don't feel like writing because they're alrea- ahem. "Just roommates".

Additional Notes

My second released character. Contains more than just one, so, might be a bit worse admittedly.. Oh well. Feedback appreciated.
creator: Somniaces
